description_long: This rifle features a futuristic design with a predominantly white and green color scheme, accented by black and metallic elements. The body is compact and angular, with a prominent cylindrical component at the front that may serve as a power cell or advanced barrel shroud. The grip is ergonomic, featuring a dark, possibly rubberized insert for improved handling, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower frame. There are visible rails and mechanical details along the top and sides, suggesting modularity for attachments. The rear of the rifle has a short, metallic extension that could function as a minimalistic stock or brace. The overall construction appears to blend metal and polymer materials, giving it a lightweight yet durable appearance suitable for urban tactical scenarios.
description: A compact, futuristic rifle with a white and green color scheme, ergonomic grip, and modular design details. Features a cylindrical front component and minimalistic rear extension.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cylindrical front component and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the ergonomic grip, trigger, and detailed mechanical features along the body.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the minimalistic stock or brace and the overall slimness of the rifle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the same ergonomic grip and modular details, with clear visibility of the cylindrical front and rear extension.
